meaning: 瀵嗗皵娌冨熀[缇庡浗濞佹柉搴锋槦宸炰笢鍗楅儴娓競]
examples: I flew to Milwaukee in early March.
I was working with a guy from Milwaukee.
John Henry Williams was a no-show at last week's game in Milwaukee.
The Chicago Cubs and Milwaukee Brewers are keeping prices the same this year versus 2010.
Bucyrus, which is based in South Milwaukee, Wisconsin, will be kept as a brand.
